comment.body: so if I'm paying attention to this right, the strike IV skew put side is much higher than call side and the realized vol rate of change is going from -1.30 to -1.1 showing an increase in volatility which is why we were able to break out of that 5930 resistance area and also why we're able to keep pushing this 5935 pivot area she mentioned. "Upside pivot is 5939.50 and downside pivot is the 5883.50 - 5894.72 zone, both needs hightened vol to break out of the gamma magnets."
